meta.title: ModelZone · Wind Chaser 64 | 1:64 Scale Desktop Wind Tunnel
meta.description: ModelZone presents Wind Chaser 64, a desktop wind tunnel engineered for 1:64 model cars. Defining the aesthetics of airflow. Protect what you love.

announcement.message: Wind Chaser 64 is shipping worldwide · 180-day warranty · 7-day returns

hero.description: A real wind tunnel, miniaturized for the car collectors who care. Watch smoke trace the surface of any 1:64 model — and see what the world's automakers have been staring at for decades.
hero.signature: Designed in Shenzhen · Crafted in Dongguan

feature1.title: Built for the cars you already own.
feature1.body: A 134 × 54 × 33mm chamber sized for every mainstream 1:64 diecast — Hot Wheels, Tomica, Mini GT, Tarmac Works. No adapters, no compromises.

feature2.title: 30ml of visible physics.
feature2.body: A removable, fully transparent fog chamber runs on 30 ml of petrolatum-based oil — enough for long demos, easy to refill, food-grade safe.

feature3.title: Your next desk centerpiece.
feature3.body: Monolithic ABS shell, 220 × 99 × 59mm footprint, 476g weight. It fits between your keyboard and monitor, or on a shelf next to your collection.

feature4.title: The real principles, scaled down.
feature4.body: Three flow-straighteners, a primary filter and an activated-carbon + PM2.5 stage deliver stable laminar airflow. The same physics taught in automotive wind-tunnel labs — on your desk.

gallery.title: Your next desk centerpiece.
gallery.description: From studios to classrooms — see how collectors live with Wind Chaser 64.

quotes.q1: It turns high-end aerodynamics into something you can touch.
quotes.q2: Principle, experiment, creation — elegance in every step.
quotes.q3: A small cavity, and the texture of wind finally becomes visible.

q1.a: Wind Chaser 64 is built specifically for 1:64 scale — Hot Wheels, Matchbox, Tomica, Mini GT, Tarmac Works, and similar. Chamber is 134 × 54 × 33mm.

q2.q: How often do I refill the fog oil?
q2.a: The 30 ml reservoir supports long continuous sessions. Refill via the included syringe. The oil is petrolatum-based, food-safe and non-toxic.

q3.a: Ships with a DC 12V 3A universal adapter (36W, 50Hz). CE, FCC, and RoHS certified.

q4.a: Ships from Dongguan, China via DHL/EMS. Worldwide delivery typically 7–14 days. Shipping insurance included.

q5.a: 180-day full warranty, 7-day no-questions returns, and accidental-damage repair service. Send us a photo for a little surprise.

q6.a: Available for resellers, model-car stores, and schools. Use the contact form below for pricing and availability.

newsletter.title: Updates, never spam.
newsletter.description: New drops, workshop projects, community builds. One short email a month.
